description: Apply when creating or modifying an iOS keyboard extension Info.plist — missing PrimaryLanguage crashes iOS 27; GENERATE_INFOPLIST_FILE must be NO or XcodeGen overwrites custom plist; NSExtensionPrincipalClass must be hardcoded.
Apply when deploying or debugging iOS apps from a Linux Docker container — usbmuxd must run inside container with -v bind mount for hot-plug; host's usbmuxd + udev rule must be disabled.
Apply when building iOS keyboard extensions — ~48MB jetsam cap requires Release config and stripped debug dylibs.
Apply when pushing to GitHub from a container without credential helper — use temporary credential helper script with PAT, deleted in finally block.
